RevokeSecurityGroupRule.securityGroupId: The security group ID of the security group whose rule is to be revoked
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.sgVersion: Security group version number, used for optimistic locking control
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule: The security group rule to be revoked
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.remark: Rule remark (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.direction: Rule direction, valid values: ingress/egress (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.ethertype: Ethernet protocol type (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.portRange: Port range, e.g. 1-65535; empty string means all ports (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.protocol: Protocol type, valid values: tcp/udp/icmp; empty string means all protocols (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Source security group ID, valid only when direction is ingress (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Source IP address (CIDR format), valid only when direction is ingress (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Destination security group ID, valid only when direction is egress (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Destination IP address (CIDR format), valid only when direction is egress (create security group, list security groups, authorize security group rule, revoke security group rule)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.securityGroupId: ID of the security group to which the rule belongs (list security groups)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.securityGroupRuleId: Security group rule ID (list security groups)
RevokeSecurityGroupRule.rule.updatedTime: Rule last update time (list security groups)
